decision-tree.root-question: Is there a viable cohort to sustain rituals (≥5 builders + organiser)?

branch.question: Is the 90-day retention above the design-review threshold?

branch.conclusion: Emit / continue the ritual calendar using `templates/ritual-calendar.yaml`. Apply r2-artefact-per-ritual, r3-public-log within 48h, r4-rotating-host every 4-6 sessions.
Block calendar continuation. Run a ritual-design review (format, exit-criteria, time slot) before scheduling the next session.
Skip. Group is too small or lacks an organiser; switch to 1:1 mentorship until ≥5 builders + 1 organiser exist.

example.p: 8 builders, alice as organiser, 90-day retention 45%. → conclusion r1-cadence-not-vibes → emit calendar with monthly office hours + biweekly eval-sharing.
